{"title":"Automated vault tagging pipeline","summary":"Build a system that watches vault files and auto-generates semantic tags using local LLM inference.","body":"## Overview

Create a pipeline that monitors the vault directory for new or modified markdown files, extracts key concepts, and assigns semantic tags automatically.

## Implementation

1. Watch filesystem events via existing VaultWatcher
2. On file change, extract text content
3. Run through local Ollama model for tag extraction
4. Write tags back to frontmatter

## Benefits

- Reduces manual tagging effort
- Improves vault searchability
- Maintains consistent tag taxonomy","risks":["Tag quality depends on model accuracy","May overwrite manually curated tags"],"benefits":["Hands-free organization","Better discoverability"],"estimated_scope":"m"}
